title: Mom's graduation-time-switch letter to Mrs. Gerard (2021)
html:
Mom's graduation-time-switch letter to Mrs. Gerard (2021)

Source: 2021-05-30 Apple Note. Yahir ghostwriting his mom's email to a school administrator (Mrs. Gerard) to switch his graduation slot back to the 4th group after he'd already requested a switch to the 2nd.

TL;DR

  • Yahir wrote his mom's voice for a logistical school request — first-person as Iracema Vargas: "My name is Iracema Vargas. I am the mother of Yahir Gonzalez." This is the earliest documented instance of the pattern that recurs in Rankett build doc and other client-comms ghostwriting.
  • Iracema Vargas = Yahir's mom's full name (first capture in the corpus). Cross-references mom house by the river goal.
  • Reason for the swap: Yahir told the school the family would be there for the 4th-group time, then "made a rushed mistake" — grandparents are coming for the 7:30 (4th) slot.
  • The note lives in Yahir's Apple Notes even though it's a letter from his mother — confirms Yahir as the household's email-writer for English-language admin.
  • 2021-05-30 is OSU graduation week / HS graduation timing (this is HS graduation in Grants Pass); the note sits in the transition to OSU.

Connections

  • yahir family
  • mom house by the river
  • grants pass teen era
  • ghost white label — same skill-tree (writing in someone else's voice professionally)
  • 2026 04 27 rankett com build doc — adult-era recurrence of ghostwriting
